planning_decisions.decision: Prototype is pre-approved; skip prototype phase and proceed directly to implementation
planning_decisions.rationale: All 7 prototype HTML mocks in prototype/files-*.html are marked approved=true in docs/sprint-logs/S033/prototype-review.json. The calling agent confirmed this explicitly.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装

planning_decisions.decision: selection state (selectedPaths: Set<string>) lifted to files-view.tsx, NOT a Zustand store
planning_decisions.rationale: Multi-select is a transient UI state scoped to a single Files tab instance. DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.coding_conventions: 状態は Zustand に集約。コンポーネント state は UI 一時状態のみ — multi-select is UI-temporary. Zustand store would be overkill here.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES priority 8: ナビゲーション保持 > UI state 保持

planning_decisions.decision: context menu as portal via ReactDOM.createPortal to document.body
planning_decisions.rationale: Prototype explicitly states 'portal-rendered, viewport-fixed'. Without portal, the menu is clipped by list pane overflow:auto. This is the standard approach and avoids z-index complexity.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 明示的 > 暗黙的

planning_decisions.decision: SearchEntries extended with ?type=dir filter in the handler (FE side filter), not in browser.go
planning_decisions.rationale: Adding ?type=dir to the search handler query param keeps browser.go generic. The existing SearchEntries already returns Entry with IsDir flag so FE or handler can filter. Minimal blast radius.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装

planning_decisions.decision: POST /files/move uses {from, to} for single-item and {paths, target} for batch; same endpoint handles both via JSON shape
planning_decisions.rationale: ROADMAP spec says 'batch 兼用' for move endpoint. Distinguishing by JSON fields is cleaner than two endpoints for the same underlying os.Rename operation.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 明示的 > 暗黙的

planning_decisions.decision: inline-create-row and inline-rename-row are implemented inline in file-list.tsx and files-view.tsx rather than separate component files
planning_decisions.rationale: Both are tightly coupled to the list rendering and selection state. Extracting to separate files would require prop-drilling or additional context. Inline is cleaner for the scale.
planning_decisions.principle: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装
